page.title: Enviro Components
page.subtitle: Visual reference for the Enviro design adoption
page.description: This page is an internal reference. It exposes the 15 wrapper components and the 7 animation helpers built on top of @kit/ui and the enviro-* tokens (theme.css).

demo.cardCreamBody: Light surface for primary content. Tokens: bg cream-50, fg forest-900, card shadow.
demo.cardDarkBody: Dark surface for inverse sections. Tokens: bg forest-900, fg white, lime accent.
demo.cardLimeBody: Surface with light green accent for highlights and secondary CTAs.
demo.cardGlassBody: Frosted glass surface, ideal over hero with background image.
demo.sectionSubtitle: Every component honors prefers-reduced-motion and uses namespaced CSS tokens.
demo.heroDescription: Full-bleed hero with fluid clamp title, AVIF background, dark gradient overlay, bracket badges and dual CTA.
demo.pageHeroSubtitle: For inner pages (about, pricing, contact, normes, faq)

faq.title: You have questions, we have answers

q1.question: How does blockchain traceability work?
q1.answer: Each lot gets a unique identifier recorded on the Polygon blockchain. Movements are timestamped and cryptographically signed, ensuring an immutable, publicly verifiable ledger.

q2.question: Are my data hosted in Europe?
q2.answer: Yes. Our Supabase databases are hosted in the European region (Frankfurt). No personal or commercial data leaves the EU.

q3.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q3.answer: Yes, with no fees. You keep access to your data and exports for 30 days after cancellation.

q4.question: What integrations are available?
q4.answer: We integrate with Stripe for billing, Docusign for contract signing, Anthropic for the AI copilot, and we expose a documented REST API for custom integrations.
